title: Explanations of obsessive-compulsive disorder
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — genetic, serotonin, and cognitive-behavioural explanations of OCD.
learningObjectives: Explain genetic and neurobiological factors in OCD.
Outline serotonin dysfunction and brain circuits.

simpleExplanation.title: Why the rituals stick
simpleExplanation.summary: OCD may involve inherited vulnerability, low serotonin, and beliefs about responsibility — compulsions are reinforced because they briefly reduce anxiety.
steps: Cognitive — thought-action fusion, overestimation of threat.

sections.content: **OCD explanations** (1.5.2) — integrate **biological + cognitive + learning** in evaluation.
